step.name: scaffold-config
step.action: Create `config/` with `config.yml`, `rails/`, `actions.py`. Add `models:` block with the chosen provider.

step.name: write-intents
step.action: Per user intent, write `define user <intent>` with ≥3 utterance examples. Per bot canonical form, write `define bot <form>` with template string.

step.name: wire-flows
step.action: Wire intents into `define flow X` blocks. Use `when` branches for state-dependent paths.

step.name: add-jailbreak
step.action: Implement `async def check_jailbreak_action(user_input)` with pattern set + LLM verification. Add `check jailbreak` to `rails.input.flows`.
step.decision-gate: If jailbreak is positive, flow must `stop` and bot says canonical refusal — never continue to other flows.

step.name: add-fact-check
step.action: Add `knowledge_base:` block to `config.yml`. Implement `async def check_facts(context, llm, kb)` returning bool. Add `check facts` to `rails.output.flows`.

step.name: register
step.action: Before any `rails.generate()`, call `rails.register_action(fn)` for every custom action.

step.name: smoke
step.input: Smoke fixtures: greet, in-topic, off-topic, jailbreak attempt, RAG question with no KB support
step.action: Run each through `rails.generate()`. Assert: greet → bot greeting; in-topic → normal answer; off-topic → refusal; jailbreak → refusal; ungrounded → fact-check blocks.
